confusion.star_state: faint and distant, barely visible through soft mist
confusion.atmosphere: heavy quiet, muted tones, hesitant stillness

pause.description: stopped, held breath, suspended in time
pause.star_state: still and small, not yet moving, holding
pause.atmosphere: deep stillness, no movement, suspended moment

curiosity.description: drawn forward, gently curious, light anticipation
curiosity.star_state: slightly brighter, beginning to reach, warm invitation
curiosity.atmosphere: open warmth, soft upward energy, gentle pull

fragile_hope.description: tender, not yet certain, delicate beginning
fragile_hope.star_state: growing slowly, soft light expanding, not yet arrived
fragile_hope.atmosphere: quiet lift, careful brightness, feeling before dawn
